name: tournament-manager
description: Tournament Management Platform — Express/MongoDB API + React SPA monorepo

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix shared install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run seed && npm run seed:demo
